self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Masons' Ditty (R5): consuming 3 Unity's Symbols (gained from healing/being healed) on Skill or Burst use grants the Struggle effect for 10s: +7% ATK and +13% All Elemental DMG Bonus per Symbol consumed (21% ATK / 39% all_dmg_ at 3 stacks). Triggers at most once every 15s.
